'''√y-sh-ch''' ('''kayashach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kweng|kweng]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kweng|kweng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √y-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayashach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiyashach || jiyashach || shiyashach || kiyashach
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuyashach || jujuyashach || shushuyashach || kukuyashach
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuyashach || juyashach || shuyashach || kuyashach
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuyashach || juyashach || shuyashach || kuyashach
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theyashach || jeyashach || sheyashach || keyashach
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoyashach || jojoyashach || shoshoyashach || kokoyashach
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoyashach || joyashach || shoyashach || koyashach
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoyashach || joyashach || shoyashach || koyashach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yashach || yashach || yashach || yashach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yashach || yashach || yashach || yashach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yashach || yashach || yashach || yashach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yashach || yashach || yashach || yashach
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæyashach || jæyashach || shæyashach || kæyashach
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathayashach || jajayashach || shashayashach || kakayashach
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thayashach || jayashach || shayashach || kayashach
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thayashach || jayashach || shayashach || kayashach
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shayashach
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshayashach
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishayashach
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shayashachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshayashachnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishayashachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shayashachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshayashachnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishayashachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shayashachro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshayashachnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishayashachro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shayashachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshayashachnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishayashachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shayashachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshayashachnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishayashachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shayashachng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshayashachnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishayashachng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shayashachya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshayashachnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishayashachya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shayashachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshayashachnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishayashachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shayashachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshayashachnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishayashachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shayashachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayashachnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayashachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shayashachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshayashachnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayashachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shayashachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshayashachnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishayashachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shayashachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayashachnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayashachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shayashachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshayashachnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayashachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shayashachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshayashachnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishayashachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shayashachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshayashachnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishayashachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shayashachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshayashachnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayashachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shayashachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshayashachnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishayashachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shayashachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshayashachnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishayashachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shayashachmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayashachnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayashachmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
